title: Develop CLI Interface
description: Create the main command-line interface for the calculator, including a menu loop and input handling.

title: Implement Arithmetic Operations
description: Develop the core Python functions for addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

title: Implement Input Validation
description: Add validation for user inputs, including handling division by zero errors.

title: Implement JSON Storage
description: Develop functions to read from and write calculation history to a history.json file using Python's built-in 'json' library.

title: Implement View History Feature
description: Add functionality to display past calculations stored in history.json.

title: Module Separation
description: Organize code into separate modules (main.py, calculator.py, storage.py) as per the architecture.

title: Add Docstrings and Comments
description: Ensure all functions have docstrings and code is adequately commented for clarity and maintainability.

title: PEP 8 Compliance
description: Format the entire codebase to be PEP 8 compliant.
